content: Uhm cuz theory cant be 100% true

Aurita just feels like someone I just attach to a complete 3 man team. If you try to build around her, Aurita just bloats your deck with cards, making it harder for other characters to get their command cards to support her. To me, she's almost her own thing.  Don't know why her shuffle card costs 2 energy when Casiah can do it for 1 energy
Also, getting specific cards together for a combo is always gonna lead to inconsistencies unless they have retain. Rather use posse for discard than to rely on a command card
Then again, I don't have Tulu, so I don't know how it feels to play both
